title: AppleskinStage
description: Stage the appleskin mod behind a stage
body:
This mod is an addon to the gamestage mod and the Appleskin mod.

You will be able to stage the Appleskin mod overlay using crafttweaker scripts. 

Before the unlock of the stage, the hunger bar and the hearts bar will stay vanilla.

After the unlock, all the tooltips and the informations of the Appleskin mod will be visible.

dependencies :


[Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/) by squeek502
[Crafttweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker/) by Jareddlll08
[Gamestage](https://modrinth.com/mod/game-stages/) by DarkhaxDev

script.zs example for CraftTweaker integration :


```
import mods.appleskinstage.AppleskinStage;

AppleskinStage.setStage("Demo_Stage");
```

Feel free to use it in your modpack and to ask questions in the comment. 

Logo by dxinxo
